svg.text: AIS Pipeline — Architecture, Scalability, Fault Tolerance, Error Handling & Retention
Left: Pipeline Overview · Right: Cross-cutting Concerns · ✓ In Place · ⚠ Fix Needed
TCP/TLS · tag block parse · source map · fragment TTL · dual write
NMEANorm → FragAssembler → NMEAParser → ASMDecoder → Type24Joiner → ValidationEngine
GOOD + WARN → PASS to raw_production · ERROR → REJECT (kept in Stage)
Exactly-once via Iceberg ACID · configurable quality threshold
ACID · Time travel · Schema evolution · Glue Catalog
Athena (ad-hoc SQL) · Tier 2: VUID (future) · Tier 3: Fusion (future)
• KDA (AWS Kinesis Data Analytics for Apache Flink)
• Fat JAR via Maven Shade (provided Flink runtime)
• GitHub Actions: build → test → promote → deploy
• Local dev: Docker Compose (Flink + Redpanda + MinIO)
✓ Job 1 confirmed working end-to-end (Parquet in MinIO)
• FLINK_PARALLELISM env var — 4 default, 12 KPU in prod
• Keyed state (FragAssembler, Type24Joiner) distributes by key hash
• KDA auto-scaling enabled in prod (disabled in test env)
• 5 vendor feeds × dedicated receiver pods (no shared state)
⚠ targetFileSizeBytes is NEVER USED in S3ParquetSinkBuilder
Files roll only on checkpoint — not on size target
At low traffic: files much smaller than 64 MB
• State backend: filesystem — durable, survives TaskManager restarts
• OnCheckpointRollingPolicy — partial Parquet files never exposed
• ListState + ValueState — auto-restored from checkpoint on restart
• Kafka offsets committed on checkpoint (exactly-once consumer-side)
• IAM/SASL_SSL for MSK · plaintext NONE for local dev
⚠ No restart strategy set — Flink may fail-fast on error
Acceptable for Job 1 · Job 3 uses Iceberg ACID
• Kafka producer: acks=all · idempotent · retries=3 · backoff=500ms
• NMEAParser: malformed lines → no record emitted (no exception throw)
• ASMDecoder: all exceptions caught + logged DEBUG · record continues
• ValidationEngine: violations → violations[] · never drops records
• FragmentAssembler: TTL timer purges stale state cleanly
• record_quality: GOOD / WARN / ERROR preserves all for audit
• lz4 compression on Kafka producer (batch.size=256 KB)
⚠ No Dead Letter Queue — unparseable NMEA silently dropped
Fix: NMEAParser side output → MSK: ais.parse.dlq
Captures raw line + topic + error reason for audit
⚠ No Flink restart strategy (see Fault Tolerance above)
⚠ No stale fragment metric — dropped fragments invisible
Consider: counter on TTL expiry for monitoring
(low priority — add when monitoring is built)
• MSK topics: 7-day retention (all 6 topics per architecture doc)
• Iceberg: table-level retention managed by Iceberg expire_snapshots
• Glue Catalog: schema versions tracked via Schema Registry
• Redpanda local: defaults OK for dev (data not persisted across rebuilds)
⚠ S3 ais-raw/: no lifecycle rule — grows indefinitely
⚠ S3 ais-bronze/ + ais-stage/: no lifecycle rules defined
Fix: Terraform S3 lifecycle rules per bucket
⚠ Flink checkpoints: no retention limit set in code
KDA manages max retained checkpoints automatically
⚠ High priority fixes: (1) Restart strategy (2) DLQ side output (3) Checkpoint retention
⚠ Medium: S3 lifecycle rules (Terraform) · Min pause between checkpoints
